# Voltura Air

Voltura Air is free, open-source Windows software from Voltura AB. It turns a
phone, tablet, or browser-capable device into a local-network control surface
for a Windows 11 PC.

## Core capabilities

- Touch trackpad, keyboard, browser-supported dictation, media remote, and
  landscape split mode.
- PowerPoint, Google Slides, and PDF/browser presentation control with an
  integrated trackpad, native laser pointer, timer, slide/break statistics, and
  optional reports stored on the Windows PC.
- YouTube, Kodi, browser, media, volume, window, and approved application
  controls.
- Acknowledged text transfer to reviewed PC destinations and an explicit,
  host-permitted PC clipboard text read.
- Keep Windows awake while Voltura Air runs, with an optional Keep screen on
  setting.
- Host-controlled permissions for paired devices and disruptive PC actions.
- QR pairing with saved reconnect on the same Wi-Fi or LAN.

## Product boundaries

- No account, subscription, cloud relay, or internet input forwarding.
- Not a remote-desktop, file-sync, or public-internet remote-control service.
- A sleeping or shut-down PC cannot receive a Voltura Air wake command.
- Release binaries are currently not code-signed, so Windows may show an
  unknown-publisher or SmartScreen warning.

## Distribution

Releases provide a default installer that can download missing .NET 10 Desktop
and ASP.NET Core runtimes, a full installer that includes the runtimes, and a
portable ZIP.

## Authoritative links

- Product page: https://voltura.se/air/
- Implemented capabilities: https://github.com/voltura/voltura-air/blob/main/docs/features.md
- Setup: https://github.com/voltura/voltura-air/blob/main/docs/setup.md
- Security policy: https://github.com/voltura/voltura-air/blob/main/SECURITY.md
- Privacy policy: https://github.com/voltura/voltura-air/blob/main/PRIVACY.md
- Source code: https://github.com/voltura/voltura-air
- Latest release: https://github.com/voltura/voltura-air/releases/latest
- License: https://github.com/voltura/voltura-air/blob/main/LICENSE
